title: Tasty Roasted Russian Kidney Bean Casserole
description: A kid-friendly Russian dish featuring roasted kidney beans in a crispy mantecare-emulsified sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the salt, pepper, and grated cheese until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the kidney beans and the cheese sauce, stirring until the beans are well coated.
Transfer the bean mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with breadcrumbs.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy.
